title: Golden Creeper
description: A Mod that spawns a Golden Creeper which is hard to kill but also worth it...
body:
# THE GOLDEN CREEPER

This simple mod adds a rare **golden Creeper** to your world, which is **difficult** to find and kill but also comes with a **surprise**...

_Want to know more? Find out..._

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Only click the Spoiler if you want a detailed description of the Mod!
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_Details:_

 **Golden Creeper:**
- Spawns in every biome
- Spawns only at night
- Doesnt explode
- **2x** walk speed
- **2x** Damage as normal creeper
- Drops the Ultra Golden Apple which gives you 30 minutes of healing and strenght
- If your eat the Apple it will transform into a normal Golden Apple

</details>
